headline: Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
summary: Industrial machinery company Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 10.6% year on year to $5.49 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $8.17 per share was 4.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
